name: task-management-ui
goal: Build a clean, interactive Tasks page in the web app (arete view) inspired by Things 3, with tabs (Today/Upcoming/Anytime/Someday), quick scheduling, and AI-driven suggestions.

userStories.title: Core TaskService.updateTask() Method
userStories.description: Add updateTask(id, updates) method to existing TaskService in packages/core/src/services/tasks.ts. Signature: updateTask(id: string, updates: { due?: string | null }): Promise<WorkspaceTask>. Updates task metadata; text and ID remain unchanged. Throws TaskNotFoundError for unknown ID. Throws AmbiguousIdError if ID prefix matches multiple tasks. File written atomically (no partial updates on error). Follow existing completeTask() pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: updateTask adds @due(YYYY-MM-DD) to task without existing date
updateTask modifies existing @due date
updateTask removes @due when due=null
updateTask preserves other metadata (@area, @person, @from)
updateTask throws TaskNotFoundError for non-existent ID
updateTask throws AmbiguousIdError for ambiguous prefix
updateTask is atomic — file unchanged on validation error
Method exported from tasks.ts
Errors are typed exports (TaskNotFoundError, AmbiguousIdError)

userStories.title: Backend Write Lock Utility
userStories.description: Create withFileLock(filePath, fn) in packages/apps/backend/src/services/locks.ts to prevent concurrent write corruption. Mutex per file path using async queue pattern. Lock timeout: 5 seconds (prevents deadlock). Release lock in finally block (even on error). Similar pattern to existing withSlugLock in meetings routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Concurrent writes to same file are serialized (not interleaved)
Writes to different files proceed in parallel
Lock is released on function error
Lock times out after 5 seconds with descriptive error
Utility exported from locks.ts

userStories.title: Backend Tasks API Routes (CRUD)
userStories.description: Create task API routes in packages/apps/backend/src/routes/tasks.ts with GET, PATCH, DELETE endpoints. GET /api/tasks with filters (filter=today|upcoming|anytime|someday, waitingOn=true) + pagination (limit, offset). PATCH /api/tasks/:id update task per wire format using withFileLock(). DELETE /api/tasks/:id delete task using withFileLock(). 'today' filter: @due(today) UNION must bucket, deduped, sorted (overdue first). Register routes in backend server.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: GET returns paginated list with total count
GET filter=today includes must bucket tasks
GET filter=today includes @due(today) tasks
GET filter=today dedupes tasks matching both criteria
GET filter=today sorts overdue before today (by days overdue desc)
GET waitingOn=true filters to tasks with @from(commitment:*)
GET returns 400 for invalid filter param
PATCH updates completion status
PATCH updates due date
PATCH clears due date when due=null
PATCH moves between destinations
PATCH returns 404 for unknown ID
PATCH returns 400 for invalid due date format
DELETE removes task from file
DELETE returns 404 for unknown ID
Concurrent PATCH requests are serialized (no file corruption)

userStories.title: Backend Suggestions Endpoint
userStories.description: Create GET /api/tasks/suggested endpoint for AI-driven task recommendations. Parse weekPriorities from now/week.md '## Priorities' section. Assemble simplified ScoringContext (todayMeetingAttendees: [], weekPriorities from parsed file). Call scoreTasks() from packages/core/src/services/task-scoring.ts. Return top 10 scored tasks with breakdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns scored tasks sorted by score descending
Respects ScoringContext.referenceDate
Parses weekPriorities from week.md correctly
Returns empty array when no tasks
Excludes completed tasks
Handles missing week.md gracefully (empty priorities array)
Handles malformed week.md (no Priorities section)

userStories.title: Frontend Types and API Client
userStories.description: Add task types to packages/apps/web/src/api/types.ts matching wire format. Add packages/apps/web/src/api/tasks.ts with fetch functions: fetchTasks(filter, options), fetchTaskSuggestions(), updateTask(id, updates), deleteTask(id). Type mapping in API layer (not components). Error messages include context (field, ID, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: fetchTasks maps wire format correctly to frontend types
fetchTasks handles empty response
fetchTaskSuggestions handles empty suggestions
updateTask sends correct PATCH body
deleteTask sends DELETE request
fetchTasks throws on network error with actionable message
fetchTasks throws on 500 with error from body
fetchTasks throws on 400 with field-specific error
fetchTasks throws on 404 with task ID

userStories.title: Frontend Hooks with Race Condition Protection
userStories.description: Create TanStack Query hooks in packages/apps/web/src/hooks/tasks.ts: useTasks(filter, options), useTaskSuggestions(), useUpdateTask(), useCompleteTask(). Query config: staleTime: 30_000, gcTime: 300_000. Optimistic update pattern: cancelQueries before update, getQueriesData/setQueriesData (plural) for pagination, rollback in onError. Race condition protection: mutations debounced 100ms; ignore duplicate calls while pending. Use ref pattern to avoid stale closure bugs.
acceptanceCriteria: useTasks refetches on filter change
useTasks uses correct staleTime (30s)
useUpdateTask optimistically updates cache
useUpdateTask rolls back on error
useUpdateTask calls cancelQueries before optimistic update
useCompleteTask invalidates queries on success
useCompleteTask ignores duplicate calls while pending
useUpdateTask debounces rapid calls (100ms)
Mutations use ref pattern to avoid stale closure bugs

userStories.title: Frontend Avatar Component
userStories.description: Create packages/apps/web/src/components/Avatar.tsx for single-person display. Props: name: string, size?: 'sm' | 'md'. Compute initials from name (first letter of first two words). Include Tooltip with full name (use existing shadcn Tooltip). Accessible via aria-label.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders initials from name ("John Doe" → "JD")
Renders single initial for single word name
Shows tooltip on hover with full name
Handles empty name gracefully (shows "?")
Has accessible label via aria-label

userStories.title: Frontend TasksPage Error Boundary
userStories.description: Add error boundary wrapper to TasksPage for graceful error handling. Create error boundary component or use react-error-boundary. Wrap TasksPage content. On error: show 'Something went wrong' message with retry button. Log error to console (structured object with component stack).
acceptanceCriteria: Error boundary catches child component errors
Error boundary shows 'Something went wrong' message
Retry button re-mounts children (resets error state)
Error is logged with component stack

userStories.title: Frontend TasksPage Shell with Tabs
userStories.description: Create main TasksPage component with tab navigation. Add route /tasks to App.tsx. Add to sidebar navigation. Tab navigation: Today, Upcoming, Anytime, Someday. Waiting On filter toggle (URL param ?waitingOn=true). Tab via URL param ?tab=today (default: today). Empty states per tab with role='status'. Use existing shadcn Tabs component.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders all four tabs (Today, Upcoming, Anytime, Someday)
Tab click updates URL param ?tab=
URL param selects correct tab on page load
Waiting On toggle updates URL param ?waitingOn=true
Shows correct empty state per tab
Empty states have role='status' for accessibility
Loading state shows skeleton
Error state shows error message with retry
Arrow keys navigate between tabs
Tabs have correct aria-selected state
Page renders at 375px viewport without horizontal scroll

userStories.title: Frontend Task List with Line Items
userStories.description: Build task list component with interactive line items. Task row: checkbox, Avatar (if person), description, schedule badge. Commitment badge if from?.type === 'commitment'. Checkbox click → useCompleteTask() mutation. During mutation: checkbox shows spinner (disabled). On success: task row fades out (300ms). On error: toast 'Failed to complete task'. Keyboard: Space/Enter on focused row completes task. Long text truncates with ellipsis.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders task text and checkbox
Renders Avatar with person initials when person exists
Renders schedule badge with correct icon per destination
Renders commitment badge when from exists
Checkbox click calls complete mutation
Checkbox shows spinner during mutation
Completed task fades out (300ms)
Failed completion shows toast error
Space key completes focused task
Rapid checkbox clicks don't create duplicate mutations
Long task text truncates with ellipsis

userStories.title: Frontend Quick Schedule Popup
userStories.description: Build schedule popup for quick date assignment. Click schedule badge → shadcn Popover. Options: Today / Tomorrow / Pick date / Anytime / Someday. Date picker: shadcn Calendar (install if not present). On selection → useUpdateTask() with new due value. Popup closes after selection; focus returns to trigger badge. Full keyboard accessibility with escape, arrow keys, enter, focus trap, and ARIA roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking badge opens popover
Selecting Today sets due to today's date
Selecting Tomorrow sets due to tomorrow's date
Selecting Anytime clears due date (due=null)
Selecting Someday moves to someday destination
Escape key closes popover
Arrow keys navigate options
Enter selects highlighted option
Popup closes after selection
Focus returns to trigger after close
Popup has role='listbox', options have role='option'

userStories.title: Frontend Today View with Suggestions
userStories.description: Build Today tab with tasks and AI suggestions sections. Top section: 'Tasks' — due today + overdue (sorted: overdue first by days desc). Bottom section: 'Suggested' — from /api/tasks/suggested. Sections load independently (suggestions can fail without breaking tasks). Suggestions show skeleton while loading. Action buttons on suggestions: Set Today / Schedule / Punt. Toast confirms each action. Partial failure handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders tasks section with overdue sorted first
Renders suggestions section separately
Suggestions skeleton while loading
Tasks visible when suggestions fail
Suggestions visible when tasks fail (with tasks error state)
Set Today button updates due to today's date
Schedule button opens date picker
Punt button moves to anytime destination
Toast confirms successful action
Toast shows error on failed action
